Hero.description: Want to find an accommodation? We are ready to help you find one that suits your lifestyle and needs.

About.heading: We Help Students Find Their Perfect Home
About.paragraph1: Erasmus Life Housing is your go-to hub for finding the perfect home for students, by students. Since 2013, our team has helped tons of students discover their ideal place. We have got a wide selection of student-friendly rooms, all built and managed just for you.
About.paragraph2Prefix: Our ultimate goal is to make Lisbon the number one destination for
About.paragraph2Suffix: , and we surely do not want your experience finding accommodation to be a negative part of that journey!

Testimonials.heading: That is what our clients say
Testimonials.emmaOpinion: Finding a reliable place in a new city was my biggest worry. The booking process was incredibly smooth, and the room was exactly as shown in the photos. Highly recommended for any international student!
Testimonials.lucasOpinion: The best part about this platform is the community aspect. I managed to book a shared apartment with amazing housemates. The support team was also very helpful with my contract questions.
Testimonials.matteoOpinion: Super convenient and trustworthy. I liked how easy it was to filter by university proximity. It saved me so much time and effort compared to looking through local classifieds.
Testimonials.sofiaOpinion: I was looking for a safe and quiet place to focus on my studies, and I found the perfect studio through this site. The verification process gave me peace of mind before I even arrived!

Process.heading: Fast, intuitive and absolutely safe!
Process.pickDescription: Explore hundreds of high-quality rooms, studios, and apartments. Save favorites and book it. Finding your dream home could not be easier!
Process.acceptDescription: You will receive the acceptance of the reservation from the owner in just a couple of hours. You will not have to wait long for an answer.
Process.paymentDescription: After receiving a response, all you need to do is send the payment and you are almost at the finish line!
Process.keysDescription: Your accommodation is reserved. Get ready to move as soon as possible and check in on your chosen date.

ForgotPassword.successMessage: Verification link sent! Please check your email (including spam/junk folder) to reset your password.
